summary.purpose: Decide which next research theme has the strongest preliminary evidence: lookahead early-exit, deadline/reject inspection, or FPGA-focused early-exit implementation.

interpretation_rules.lookahead: Promising only when final-wrong/no-rescue samples are common and predictable from early exit signals.
interpretation_rules.deadline_reject: Promising when useful coverage can be accepted with low false-accept rate before final.
interpretation_rules.fpga: Promising when average-cost gains exist but final-rate/profile/tail behavior creates implementation-specific design issues.

lookahead_early_exit.support: higher if not_rescued_by_final_rate is large and AUC is high

deadline_reject_inspection.support: higher if reject allows low false-accept rate at useful coverage

fpga_early_exit_implementation.support: higher if useful accuracy-cost curve exists but final-rate/profile pressure remains important
